subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of the Ancient Beauty's homeland! Praise be to God, ye are from the Dayspring of the Sun of Truth and from the Orient of the Sun of Oneness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران وطن جمال قدم الحمد لله شما از مطلع شمس حقیقتید و از مشرق آفتاب احدیت
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
